description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: test-neovim, test-vim-7.4, and test-vim-latest. Each job runs in the default test stage, uses its specified Docker image (lambdalisue/neovim-ci for test-neovim, thinca/vim:v7.4 for both Vim jobs), changes directory to tests, and executes bash runtests.sh. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
